# Contributing to Internet Magazin Backend

We love your input! We want to make contributing as easy and transparent as possible.

## Development process

1. Fork the repo and create your branch from `main`.
2. Run `npm install`.
3. Create a `.env` file based on `.env.example`.
4. Make your changes, add tests for new features.
5. Run linter: `npm run lint`
6. Run tests: `npm test`
7. Push to your fork and submit a Pull Request.

## Code style

- Follow [NestJS Style Guide](https://docs.nestjs.com/recipes#style-guide)
- Use TypeScript strict mode
- Write unit tests for all controllers and services

## Commit messages

We follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/):
- `feat:` new feature
- `fix:` bug fix
- `docs:` documentation
- `refactor:` code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- `test:` adding missing tests
- `chore:` maintenance tasks

## License

By contributing, you agree that your contributions will be licensed under the MIT License.
